basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 notification in 2026 on its official portal. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow position under a project-based engagement.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 30 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, women, and persons with disabilities)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, women, and persons with disabilities.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/ B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering and M.Tech/ M.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with Research areas in Microelectronics/VLSI/ Integrated Circuits & Systems/Fabrication and Characterization. OR B.Tech/ B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering.
qualification.details: Candidates with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category and minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ST/PwD category. OR Candidates with Bachelor's degree in Engineering/ Technology with at least CGPA of 7.5/10 or 70% of marks under GEN/ GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category and at least CGPA of 7.0/10 or 65% under SC/ ST/PwD category. B.Tech/ B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering and M.Tech/ M.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with Research areas in Microelectronics/VLSI/ Integrated Circuits & Systems/Fabrication and Characterization. (OR) B.Tech/ B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering. A solid understanding of Semiconductor Physics, Semiconductor Device Modeling, Advanced MOS devices, Hands on TCAD Tools, Hands on fabrication & characterization of devices and sensors is crucial. Experience with programming languages and simulation tools such as MATLAB or Python is highly desirable.

salary_details.details: For candidates with National Eligibility Test (CSIR UGC NET or GATE): Rs. 37,000 + HRA (1st and 2nd Year), Rs. 42,000 + HRA (3rd Year, upon successful assessment and upgradation to SRF). For candidates without National Eligibility Test (CSIR UGC NET or GATE): Rs. 30,000 + HRA (1st and 2nd Year), Rs. 33,000 + HRA (3rd Year, upon successful assessment and upgradation to SRF).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Warangal is 10-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E. or equivalent in Electronics and Communication Engineering and an M.Tech/M.E. in the same field with research areas in Microelectronics/VLSI/Integrated Circuits & Systems/Fabrication and Characterization, or a B.Tech/B.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC, women, and persons with disabilities.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month plus HRA, depending on whether the candidate has a NET/GATE qualification and their year of service.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official NIT Warangal website or the provided Google Form link before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application screening followed by an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment for a Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application link?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article.
